case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, VS. COLLIN CARDIFF

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.50) SERVED NOV-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARDIFF, COLLIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARDIFF, COLLIN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,035.50, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT CARDIFF, COLLIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, HUMAN SERVICE AGENCY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CARDIFF, COLLIN
